caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark blue baseball cap and a gray shirt, is visible in a small video call window in the upper right corner of a screen. The main portion of the screen displays a presentation slide titled "Introduction" under the heading "Rural Community Food System." The slide asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community forum as locally owned and operated benefit the community?" It includes a list of "Session Videos" with various date ranges and instructions stating, "You can contribute to the development of this model by adding community or by mapping a member to evolve the map." A complex network diagram with green lines and dots is positioned on the right side of the slide. A "Legend" at the bottom identifies various elements, such as "Large Corporate Farm System." Throughout the frames, the man remains in his window, and the content of the presentation slide remains static.
